turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in two cases No. 86-684, California against Greenwood, No. 87-339, City of New York versus Federal Communications Commission will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: In California against Greenwood, which is here from the Court of Appeals of California, we reversed the judgment of that court. We have filed an opinion and explaining why Justice Brennan joined by Justice Marshall has filed a dissenting opinion. Justice Kennedy took no part in the case.
